snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public and documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code, and shared executable schemas. Focused automated gates execute current implementation and test evidence on every run.

reviewers.independence: Read-only architecture reviewer rejected the first L2 delta for missing capture/Agent evidence and imprecise guard recovery wording, then independently verified the exact repair, Owner/acceptance consistency, capture and index_rebuild limits, semantic lock, budgets, and zero-blocker score without editing files.

Fresh read-only public-entry and governance reviewer checked the exact 101-file snapshot after its own blockers were repaired: product copy, role-owned edits, delegation and Planning-sync intake, contribution routing, Pi review-only status, de-duplication, and executable governance markers; it made no file changes.

Read-only risk reviewer checked the L2 action-safety state paths, exact evidence selectors and projections, semantic-lock delta, unchanged partial states, and residual cross-process/platform gaps without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer challenged an initial status interpretation and missing open facts, then accepted the exact minimal repair: fake/local-only Owner wording, one E5.02 evidence projection, unchanged planned/partial/in-progress states, complete production gaps, and current semantic lock without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer checked the exact Quality Owner, selector and acceptance projection, required cloud/Permission and broader-retrieval gaps, unchanged partial/in-progress states, 1,056-claim semantic lock, leanness, and stale-snapshot-only gate before accepting the repaired candidate without editing files.

Read-only delta reviewer rejected an Owner rewrite that weakened prior link/security facts and acceptance gaps owned by UI or Knowledge Health, then accepted the exact repair: preserved Phase 4 rules, isolated B6.12 aggregate facts, one selector, unchanged states, correct destinations, semantic delta, and budgets without editing files.

dimensions.summary: The concise public README, AI task router, 57-document inventory, two distribution files, 99 local links, 45 anchors, role-aware context pack, and resource review/reclamation metadata remain unique and current without a new document.

Knowledge Model, executable SQLite/Markdown behavior, existing B6.12/E6.07 definitions, and acceptance agree that the internal body-free tree is rebuildable, deterministic, source-navigable, and not a public DTO, UI, durable graph, or hidden state.

The 1,057-claim semantic lock has zero unexplained drift. One exact aggregate selector augments PIGE-KNOW-002 and E6.07; both remain partial, PIGE-KNOW-004 remains planned, and P6 remains in progress with broader semantic, public-navigation, scale, and platform gaps.

Development receives one consolidated B6.12 projection after code and focused tests stabilized: one Knowledge Model Owner update, one selector, unchanged delivery states, retained Phase 4 rules, and no PRD, UI, IPC, durable-schema, or production-contract churn.

LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 57 Markdown files, 22,929 lines, 162,830 words, 1,209,995 bytes, 3,857 entry words, 5,492 trace lines, zero duplicate groups, 14 mutations, and an 8.56 percent line reduction from baseline.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:fixtures && npm run verify:boundaries && npm run verify:source-artifacts
verification.evidence: All 57 Markdown files, 99 local links, 45 anchors, 77 decisions, 12 UI tokens, 8 structural rules, 448 capture combinations, CON-001 through CON-004, three JobRecord and four owner-routing negative mutations, 45 dependency records, two fixture manifests, import boundaries, and source-artifact checks passed.

verification.command: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run smoke:parser-workers && npm run smoke:macos-vision-ocr
verification.evidence: All 59 test files and 400 tests, including the focused three-file/fourteen-test Knowledge Tree set, package and desktop type checks, production builds, PDF/Office/Web/PPTX worker smoke, PDF page rendering, and the real macOS Vision OCR helper and adapter smoke passed on the frozen candidate.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 passed: 3,857 of 4,200 entry words, zero duplicate groups, 14 mutations, 5,492 trace lines, 57 Markdown files, and an 8.56 percent line reduction from baseline.

The governed snapshot is exactly b55c5091d3a0b8f7ec7adb9be3ba1deb2641a3a361d285419cc831830a26e475 across 101 files; the current and locked semantic ledgers both contain 1,057 claims with zero differing IDs or digests.

coordination.compatibility: The B6.12 delta changes only rebuildable SQLite/Markdown-derived internal aggregate semantics; it adds no PRD, UI, IPC, public DTO, durable schema, network/model behavior, stable Requirement/Build/Exit ID, or release-state change. PIGE-KNOW-002 and E6.07 stay partial; PIGE-KNOW-004 stays planned; P6 stays in progress.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze six code/test files after focused 3/14, full 59/400, typecheck, build, full verify, parser-worker, and real macOS OCR checks passed. Product Planning made the minimal Knowledge Model/acceptance sync; a read-only delta reviewer accepted the exact repaired candidate before this one-time snapshot bind.

resolvedBlockers: Rewrote README as a 378-word product entry with user value, honest current capability, principles, v0.1 roadmap, and the Agent-authored automation goal instead of a technical inventory.

Made Product Planning the sole product, technical, development-management, and governance contract editor; kept detailed UI guidance with UI Design, code/evidence with Development, and delivery/Git/CI/releases with Project Management; cross-role edits require explicit scoped delegation.

Added Agent role, cross-role delegation, and Product Planning design-sync status to context, handoff, and PR intake; routed public design contributions to Planning or UI Design and added missing-field and missing-routing mutations.
Kept the PRD as the AI Coding Agent product contract and made PRD/Owner impact bidirectional without duplicating full definitions across documents.
Removed repeated parse/OCR and UI checklist prose in favor of exact Owner pointers; retained zero duplicate groups and reduced governed Markdown lines by 8.67 percent from baseline.

Deep-reviewed Pi v0.80.6 at a fixed commit and admitted only isolated selected-model binding and receiver-safe stream design as review-only guidance; no package, runtime, catalog, credential fallback, or dependency adoption occurred.

Synchronized single-writer pre-publication guard persistence, capture projection fencing, process-local Agent-ingest cancellation, monotonic restart recovery, and exact evidence without promoting partial states.
Synchronized the B5.10 fake/local lifecycle foundation, one exact E5.02 selector, honest planned/partial states, and complete production gaps without expanding PRD or Parser ownership.

Synchronized the B6.15 deterministic retrieval-regression foundation, one exact selector, honest partial states, private-report boundaries, and complete model/linking/vector/scale/platform gaps without changing runtime behavior.

Synchronized the B6.12 rebuildable Knowledge Tree aggregate foundation, one exact selector, honest partial/planned states, preserved Phase 4 link boundaries, and correct UI/Health ownership without exposing a public tree contract.

Repaired CON-002 so it isolates JobRecordSchema, checks root strictness and cross-field cancellation invariants, and rejects three in-memory false-positive mutations instead of matching a later unrelated schema.
nonBlockingRisks: P5 remains in progress: remaining Job-class publishers, running capture/index_rebuild/other-class cancellation, strict cross-process Job CAS and routing, parent-directory swap, guard-to-domain atomicity, guard-without-output recovery, checkpoint arrays, cross-file transactions, Windows/Paddle, packaged-filesystem proof, and visible progress/cancel UI remain open.

The local-tool lifecycle remains a fake/local service foundation: real Paddle/Python/model/language-pack transport, ordinary-ingest no-hidden-install proof, production app-data/catalog/permission/pre-vault Job/Operation wiring, OCR/UI, supply chain, packaged platforms, cross-process locking, complete recovery/GC/quarantine purge, and background lifecycle controls remain open.

The retrieval regression foundation remains lexical and synthetic: model-grounded summary/citation validation under cloud-send and Permission enforcement, tag/topic/entity and Knowledge Tree thresholds, vector/reranker ranking, 10k/100k and UI/packaged proof, checked-in or CI-produced body-free reports, and broader locale/query families remain open.

The Knowledge Tree remains internal-only: broader relation and branch semantics, richer aggregate inputs, public IPC/preload/renderer navigation, localized empty state, 10k worker/incremental rebuild proof, packaged parity, and the separately owned visual/accessibility and Knowledge Health work remain open.

Pi v0.80.6 remains review-only until exact package pins, integrity/provenance, root MIT notice and SBOM, hermetic catalog/import gates, selected-binding fixtures, Permission Broker integration, and pinned Electron/Node platform smoke pass; the Owner and TECH pins are not yet cross-checked by a dedicated verifier.

Trace projections use 5,492 of 5,500 lines and the default entry uses 3,857 of 4,200 words; future semantic additions must reclaim projection or prose capacity in the same change instead of raising budgets.

Role ownership is enforced by instructions, templates, routing markers, and negative mutations rather than operating-system write permissions; reviewers must still detect semantically disguised role crossing and contributors must fill intake fields honestly.
PRD, TECH_ARCHITECTURE, and Decision Log remain large Owner documents; future Agents should continue section-targeted reads and define each fact once.
The concise pre-alpha README intentionally has no install button, screenshots, or release download; add those only when a usable signed build and governed visual evidence exist.
Structural UI gates do not prove packaged macOS/Windows fidelity, accessibility, or human visual approval; real capture and release evidence remain open.

External-reference pins are review-time facts. Any experiment must repeat license, provenance, supply-chain, privacy, isolation, platform, and replacement checks; no reviewed project is authorized for code or asset copying by its reference row.
